phase: Phase 6 S3 — ECR/ECO 工程变更控制模块
business_context: 补齐数字主线变更控制环节: VR → Prototype → TestCenter → CertCenter → ECR/ECO → MassProduction

ecr.status: 有模型+前端视图, 无后端API路由
ecr.fields: ecr_no, title, product_code, change_type, trigger, status(draft/submitted/approved/rejected/implemented), description, impact_analysis, submitted_by, approved_by

ecn.status: 有模型, 简版前端视图, 无后端API路由
ecn.fields: ecn_no, ecr_id, title, product_code, change_scope, bom_changes(JSON), cdf_impact, certification_impact, status, effective_date

current_state.existing_schemas: ECRCreate, ECROut, ECNCreate, ECNOut in schemas/__init__.py lines 804-839
current_state.existing_frontend: views/changes/ChangesView.vue (tabs: ECR + ECN, calls /certifications/ecrs and /certifications/ecns which have no backend routes)
current_state.existing_s2_change_impact: ChangeImpactRecord has ecr_id field (nullable, already reserved for future ECR integration)

design_decisions: 创建全新的 models/ecr_eco.py, 用新表 ecr_requests / ecos / eco_items / ecr_attachments, 不与旧 ecrs/ecns 表冲突
旧 ECR/ECN 模型(test.py)保持不动, 后续可作为数据迁移源, 新 API 不再使用旧表
ECN→ECO: 用 Engineering Change Order 替代 Engineering Change Notice, 增加明细项(ECOItem)和完整状态机
状态机使用 Python Enum + 代码内校验, 不依赖额外状态机库, 复用现有的 state_machine_api.py 模式
审批流复用现有的 approval_chains + approval_requests, ECR 提交时自动创建 ApprovalRequest, 审批通过后自动推进 ECR→APPROVED
ECO 批准后的 BOM 更新采用事件驱动: ECO VERIFIED→EFFECTIVE 时触发 service 层 on_eco_effective()
变更影响分析复用 S2 ChangeImpactRule/Record, ECR 创建时可启动影响分析

phase_tasks.title: ECR/ECO 领域枚举 + 数据模型

details.description: Define all enums and SQLAlchemy models for the ECR/ECO module
files_to_create_or_modify: backend/app/core/enums.py (add ECRStatus, ECOStatus, ECRType, ECRUrgency, ECOChangeType, ECOObjectType)
backend/app/models/ecr_eco.py (new file: ECRAttachment, ECRRequest, ECO, ECOItem)

enums.ECRStatus: DRAFT, SUBMITTED, REVIEWING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CONVERTED
enums.ECOStatus: DRAFT, IMPLEMENTING, VERIFIED, EFFECTIVE, CLOSED, CANCELLED
enums.ECRType: DESIGN_CHANGE(设计变更), MATERIAL_CHANGE(物料变更), PROCESS_CHANGE(工艺变更), CERT_CHANGE(认证变更), STANDARD_CHANGE(标准变更), BOM_CHANGE(BOM变更), OTHER(其他)
enums.ECRUrgency: EMERGENCY(紧急), HIGH(高), MEDIUM(中), LOW(低)
enums.ECOChangeType: ADD(新增), MODIFY(修改), REPLACE(替换), DELETE(删除), DISABLE(禁用)
enums.ECOObjectType: PART(物料), BOM(BOM), DOCUMENT(文档), CERTIFICATION(认证), PROCESS(工艺), OTHER(其他)

ECRAttachment.fields: id, ecr_id(FK), file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, uploaded_by, created_at

ECRRequest.fields: id, code(varchar 50 unique), title, ecr_type(enum), reason(text), urgency(enum), affected_products(JSON), affected_documents(JSON), description(text), status(ECRStatus), workflow_id(int nullable, FK→approval_requests), submitter_id(int FK→users), submitter_name, reviewer_id(int nullable), reviewed_at(datetime nullable), rejection_reason(text nullable), org_id(int FK→organizations), created_at, updated_at

ECO.fields: id, code(varchar 50 unique), ecr_id(int FK→ecr_requests nullable), title, change_summary(text), implementation_plan(text nullable), effective_date(date nullable), status(ECOStatus), created_by(int FK→users), verified_by(int nullable), verified_at(datetime nullable), closed_by(int nullable), closed_at(datetime nullable), org_id, created_at, updated_at

ECOItem.fields: id, eco_id(int FK→ecos), seq(int), change_type(ECOChangeType), object_type(ECOObjectType), object_id(int), object_code(varchar 100), object_name(varchar 200), old_value(text nullable), new_value(text nullable), description(text nullable), org_id, created_at

details.notes: ECRRequest.code 自动生成格式: ECR-{YYYYMMDD}-{4位序号}, ECO.code 自动生成格式: ECO-{YYYYMMDD}-{4位序号}

details.description: Define Pydantic request/response schemas for ECR and ECO in schemas/__init__.py

schemas.ECRCreate: code(自动), title, ecr_type, reason, urgency, affected_products(Optional[str]), affected_documents(Optional[str]), description(Optional), submitter_name
schemas.ECRUpdate: title(Optional), reason(Optional), urgency(Optional), affected_products(Optional), affected_documents(Optional), description(Optional)
schemas.ECROut: all create fields + id, code, status, submitter_id, submitter_name, created_at, updated_at, attachment_count(int)
schemas.ECRAttachmentOut: id, ecr_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, uploaded_by, created_at
schemas.ECOOut: all create fields + id, code, ecr_id, status, created_by, verified_by, verified_at, closed_by, closed_at, org_id, created_at, updated_at
schemas.ECOItemCreate: change_type, object_type, object_id, object_code(Optional), object_name(Optional), old_value(Optional), new_value(Optional), description(Optional)
schemas.ECRSummaryOut: id, code, title, ecr_type, status, submitter_name, created_at
schemas.ECOSummaryOut: id, code, title, status, effective_date, created_at
schemas.ECODashboardItem: id, code, title, status, effective_date, change_type_counts(dict), item_count(int), ecr_code(Optional), ecr_title(Optional), created_at

phase_tasks.title: ECR 后端 API 模块

details.description: Create complete ECR API routes with state machine transitions and attachment support
endpoints: GET /api/ecr — 列表查询(支持筛选: status, ecr_type, urgency, submitter, date_range, keyword; 排序: created_at desc)
GET /api/ecr/{ecr_id} — ECR详情(含附件列表+关联ECO信息)
POST /api/ecr/{ecr_id}/submit — 提交审批(DRAFT→SUBMITTED, 同时创建ApprovalRequest)
POST /api/ecr/{ecr_id}/withdraw — 撤回审批(SUBMITTED→DRAFT, 关闭ApprovalRequest)
POST /api/ecr/{ecr_id}/reject — 驳回(REVIEWING/SUBMITTED→REJECTED, 填写驳回原因)
POST /api/ecr/{ecr_id}/convert — 转为ECO(APPROVED→CONVERTED, 创建对应的ECO草稿)

approval_integration.on_submit: 创建ApprovalRequest(request_type='ecr', request_id=ecr.id, chain_id=从配置获取ECR审批链)
approval_integration.on_approve: approvals.py 回调中自动调用 ECR approve API
approval_integration.chain_config: 使用现有 approval_chains 表, code='ecr_approval', 预配置步骤: [提交人上级审批→rd_director审批→quality_engineer审批]

details.permissions: require_menu('changes'), 创建时获取当前用户作为submitter

phase_tasks.title: ECO 后端 API 模块

details.description: Create complete ECO API routes with full state machine, item management, and change dashboard
endpoints: POST /api/eco — 创建ECO(可直接创建或从ECR转换, DRAFT状态)
GET /api/eco — 列表查询(支持筛选: status, date_range, keyword; 排序: created_at desc)
GET /api/eco/{eco_id} — ECO详情(含明细项列表+关联ECR信息)
POST /api/eco/{eco_id}/verify — 验证通过(IMPLEMENTING→VERIFIED, 记录verify_user/verify_time)
POST /api/eco/{eco_id}/effective — 生效(VERIFIED→EFFECTIVE, 触发BOM更新on_eco_effective())
GET /api/eco/changes — ECO变更看板(聚合数据: 按状态统计, 按类型分布, 本月新增, 待验证等)

details.description: Integrate ECR with the existing approval system (approval_chains + approval_requests)

workflow.auto_approval_chain_setup: 启动时或首次使用时自动创建 ecr_approval 审批链(如果不存在)
workflow.submit_flow: POST /api/ecr/{id}/submit → 创建 ApprovalRequest(request_type='ecr', request_id=ecr.id) → ECR.status→SUBMITTED
workflow.approve_callback: ApprovalRequest 被逐步骤审批, 最终全部通过后触发 ECR status→APPROVED
workflow.reject_callback: 任一审批人驳回 → ECR status→REJECTED, 记录 rejection_reason
workflow.extend_approval_request_type: 将 request_type 正则扩展以包含 'ecr' (当前已支持, pattern='^(ecr|purchase|register|proposal)$')

phase_tasks.title: 菜单注册 + 权限配置

details.description: Register ECR/ECO menus and paths in the RBAC permission system

changes.ALL_MENUS: Add 'ecr' and 'eco' entries (these are sub-menus under the existing 'changes' parent menu)
changes.ROLE_MENU_MAP: Add 'ecr'/'eco' to all roles that currently have 'changes' (rd_director, systems_engineer, structural_engineer, electrical_control_engineer, electrical_engineer, quality_engineer, process_engineer, project_admin, module_manager*, security_officer, engineer)
changes.frontend_types/roles.ts: Add '/ecr' and '/eco' to relevant menu items if sidebar integration needed

details.note: The 'changes' menu already exists as the parent for change management. ECR/ECO are sub-pages under it.

details.description: Create TypeScript API modules for ECR and ECO endpoints

phase_tasks.title: 前端 ECR 列表 + 详情视图

details.description: Build ECR list view and detail page with full CRUD, status transitions, attachments, and approval integration
files_to_create: frontend/src/views/changes/ECRListView.vue (列表页: 表格+筛选+搜索+分页+新建按钮)
frontend/src/views/changes/ECRDetailView.vue (详情页: 基本信息+状态时间线+附件列表+关联ECO+操作按钮)

ECRListView: el-table 展示: 编号, 标题, 类型, 紧急度, 状态(彩色tag), 提交人, 创建时间
筛选栏: 状态, 类型, 紧急度, 日期范围, 关键字搜索
新建按钮 → 弹出对话框(标题/类型/原因/紧急度/影响产品/影响文件/描述)
点击行 → 跳转详情页 /ecr/{id}
批量操作(可选): 批量提交
ECRDetailView: 顶部: ECR编号 + 状态标签 + 操作按钮(提交/撤回/批准/驳回/转ECO)
基本信息卡片: 类型, 紧急度, 影响产品(JSON渲染为标签), 提交人, 创建/更新时间
原因描述卡片: 变更原因与详细描述
附件列表卡片: 上传/下载/删除
状态时间线: 使用 el-timeline 展示变更历史
关联ECO: 如果有已转换的ECO, 显示链接
审批信息: 当前审批步骤/状态(若处于审批流程中)
按钮权限根据当前状态动态控制: DRAFT→显示[提交], SUBMITTED→显示[撤回][审批操作], APPROVED→显示[转ECO], etc.

details.note: This replaces the existing ChangesView.vue 'ECR' tab with a standalone page.

phase_tasks.title: 前端 ECO 列表 + 详情 + 看板视图

details.description: Build ECO list view, detail page with item management, and change dashboard

ECOListView: el-table: 编号, 标题, 状态(implementing/verified等彩色tag), 关联ECR, 生效日期, 创建人, 创建时间
筛选: 状态, 日期范围, 关键字
新建ECO按钮(可选择从已批准的ECR转换, 或直接创建)
ECODetailView: 顶部: ECO编号 + 状态 + 操作按钮(实施/验证/生效/关闭/取消)
基本信息: 关联ECR链接, 变更摘要, 实施方案, 生效日期
明细项表格: el-table editable, 字段: 序号, 变更类型(新增/修改/替换/删除), 对象类型(物料/BOM/文档/认证), 对象编码, 对象名称, 原值, 新值, 描述
明细项CRUD: 行内编辑或弹出对话框, 新增/修改/删除
按钮状态控制: DRAFT→[实施], IMPLEMENTING→[验证], VERIFIED→[生效], EFFECTIVE→[关闭], 任意→[取消]
ECOChDashboard: 统计卡片: 本月新增, 进行中, 待验证, 已生效, 本月关闭
状态分布饼图/环图(使用 ECharts 或 el-progress)
实现方式: 调用 GET /api/eco/changes

details.note: This replaces the existing ChangesView.vue 'ECN' tab with a more powerful ECO module.

phase_tasks.title: 前端路由更新 + 侧边栏

details.description: Add ECR/ECO routes to frontend router and update sidebar navigation
details.sidebar_update: Optionally update ALL_MENUS in roles.ts to add sub-items under /changes, or keep the existing /changes route redirect to a tabbed page that includes ECR/ECO/Dashboard tabs
details.legacy_route: Keep the existing /changes route but consider redirecting it to /ecr or a combined overview page

phase_tasks.title: BOM 联动集成 (ECO→BOM 自动更新)

details.description: When ECO becomes effective, automatically update related BOM/Parts based on ECO items

logic: 遍历 ECO 的所有 ECOItem
对于 object_type='PART' 的项: 更新 Part 表的对应字段(old_value→new_value)
对于 object_type='BOM' 的项: 更新 BOM/BOMItem 表
对于 object_type='DOCUMENT' 的项: 创建文档版本记录
记录审计日志: AuditLog(entity_type='ECO', entity_id=eco_id, action='effective')
支持事务回滚: 任一操作失败则整体回滚, ECO 状态回退至 VERIFIED
on_eco_effective.rollback: 如果 BOM 更新失败, ECO 保持在 VERIFIED 状态, 记录错误日志

phase_tasks.title: S2 变更影响分析集成

details.description: Link ECR with existing S2 ChangeImpactRule/Record system for automated impact analysis

integration_points.ecr_create: 创建 ECR 时, 如果 affected_products 包含已有关联变更影响记录, 显示链接
integration_points.ecr_detail: 在 ECR 详情页展示关联的 ChangeImpactRecord 列表(如有)
integration_points.impact_analysis_trigger: ECR 提交后可触发重新运行 S2 变更影响分析(调用 s2_change_impact API)
integration_points.data_linkage: ChangeImpactRecord.ecr_id 字段已预留, 用于关联 ECR 请求
integration_points.visualization: 在 ECR 详情页增加「认证影响分析」卡片, 展示受影响的认证类型和影响等级

phase_tasks.title: 模块注册 + 数据迁移脚本 + 文档

details.description: Register new API modules, create database migration, update models/__init__.py, and write migration script from old ECR/ECN tables
files_to_modify: backend/app/models/__init__.py (add ECRRequest, ECO, ECOItem, ECRAttachment imports)

registration.api_init: Add 's3_ecr' and 's3_eco' modules to both the import block and __all__ in api/__init__.py

migration.type: Manual SQL script or Alembic migration
migration.data_migration_optional: 如果要将旧 ecrs/ecns 数据迁移到新表, 提供可选脚本
migration.approval_chain_seed: INSERT INTO approval_chains (code, name, description) VALUES ('ecr_approval', 'ECR审批链', 'ECR工程变更审批流程')

details.documentation: Update API docs (auto-generated by FastAPI Swagger), add module description in project docs

reasoning: 执行顺序基于严格的依赖关系: (1) 先定义枚举+数据模型(s3-t1), 因为其他所有任务都依赖模型定义; (2) 然后创建 Pydantic Schema(s3-t2), 因为 API 路由需要 Schema 做请求/响应验证; (3) 核心 API 模块(s3-t3, s3-t4)优先开发, 它们是前后端的数据通道; (4) 审批集成(s3-t5)紧随 ECR API 之后, 因为 approve/reject 状态流转依赖审批系统; (5) 权限配置(s3-t6)在 API 开发之后, 确保路由存在后再注册; (6) 模块注册+迁移(s3-t13)在 API 开发完成后, 确保所有模块可被框架发现; (7) 前端 API 层(s3-t7)在后端 API 稳定后开发; (8) 前端视图(s3-t8, s3-t9, s3-t10)依赖前端 API 和路由定义; (9) BOM 集成(s3-t11)和 S2 集成(s3-t12)放在最后, 因为它们依赖 ECO/ECR API 的稳定, 且变更风险较高, 需要在核心功能验证后再接入。总计约 13 个任务, 预估 20 人天工作量。

risk_factors.factor: 新模型与旧 ECR/ECN 模型共存的数据一致性问题
risk_factors.mitigation: 新表使用独立表名(ecr_requests/ecos), 旧表(ecrs/ecns)保持不动。可选迁移脚本将旧数据导入新表后废弃旧表。
复用现有 approval_requests 表的 request_type='ecr' 模式, 已有 ApprovalRequestCreate 支持该 pattern。只需要配置审批链步骤即可。

risk_factors.factor: BOM 自动更新的数据一致性风险
risk_factors.mitigation: 使用事务包裹所有 BOM 更新操作, 失败时整体回滚并保持 ECO 在 VERIFIED 状态。实现 Saga 补偿事务模式。

risk_factors.factor: 前端状态机按钮逻辑复杂
risk_factors.mitigation: 前端使用状态-动作映射表统一管理按钮可见性, 后端返回 allowed_actions 列表辅助前端判断。

risk_factors.factor: 现有 ChangesView.vue 的平滑替换
risk_factors.mitigation: 保留旧视图文件, 新增独立视图文件。路由使用新路径 /ecr 和 /eco, 旧 /changes 可重定向到 /ecr 或保留为组合页面。

risk_assessment.critical_path: s3-t1 → s3-t2 → s3-t3 → s3-t5 → s3-t7 → s3-t8, s3-t10 (ECR 核心链路)

files_to_modify: backend/app/api/approvals.py (optional: extend for ECR auto-approval callback)

integration_checklist.approvals: 复用 approval_requests(request_type='ecr'), 需配置 ecr_approval 审批链
integration_checklist.s2_change_impact: ECRDetailView 展示关联的 ChangeImpactRecord, ecr_id 字段已预留
integration_checklist.permissions: 使用现有的 require_menu('changes') 保护 API, 新增 ecr/eco 子菜单入口
integration_checklist.existing_frontend: 保留 ChangesView.vue 作为向后兼容, 新增独立 ECR/ECO 视图
